meta.homeAnswerBlock: Ongles Charlesbourg is a nail salon at Carrefour Charlesbourg in Québec City, on boulevard Henri-Bourassa. It offers nail enhancements, fills, manicures and pedicures with a strong focus on hygiene, by appointment or walk-in.
meta.homeAnswerHeading: Ongles Charlesbourg — nail salon at Carrefour Charlesbourg
meta.servicesAnswerBlock: Ongles Charlesbourg provides nail enhancements (full set), fills, hand care and foot care. Rates depend on the service and finishes chosen; a full set starts at a reasonable price and a fill costs less than a new set.

pose-ongles.metaTitle: Nail Enhancements at Ongles Charlesbourg | Carrefour Charlesbourg, Québec
pose-ongles.metaDescription: Full set nail enhancements with or without extensions at Ongles Charlesbourg, Carrefour Charlesbourg. Nail art, multiple colours, hygiene-first. From $60.
pose-ongles.schemaDescription: Full set nail enhancements with or without extensions at Ongles Charlesbourg, Carrefour Charlesbourg. Nail art, multiple colours, hygiene-first. From $60.
pose-ongles.heroAlt: Beautiful nail enhancements — full set at Ongles Charlesbourg, Carrefour Charlesbourg
pose-ongles.answerBlock: A nail enhancement applies a full set, with or without extensions, shaped and coloured to your preference. At Carrefour Charlesbourg the service includes shaping and finishing at a reasonable rate.

remplissage.metaTitle: Nail Fill at Ongles Charlesbourg | Carrefour Charlesbourg, Québec
remplissage.metaDescription: Professional nail fill every 2–3 weeks at Ongles Charlesbourg, Carrefour Charlesbourg. Keep your enhancements fresh and strong. From $45.
remplissage.schemaDescription: Professional nail fill every 2–3 weeks at Ongles Charlesbourg, Carrefour Charlesbourg. Keep your enhancements fresh and strong. From $45.
remplissage.heroAlt: Professional nail fill in progress at Ongles Charlesbourg, Carrefour Charlesbourg
remplissage.answerBlock: A fill refreshes an existing set by filling regrowth at the base of the nail, generally every 2 to 3 weeks. At Ongles Charlesbourg it costs less than a new set and extends how long your nails last.

soins-mains.schemaDescription: Professional manicure with polish, cuticle care and nail shaping at Ongles Charlesbourg, Carrefour Charlesbourg, Québec. From $30.
soins-mains.heroAlt: Professional manicure with polish at Ongles Charlesbourg, Carrefour Charlesbourg
soins-mains.answerBlock: A manicure covers nail shaping, cuticle care and a regular or gel polish finish. At the Charlesbourg salon it is a careful, affordable service for well-kept hands.

soins-pieds.answerBlock: A pedicure is done in a sanitized station and includes toenail care, cuticles and polish. At Ongles Charlesbourg the focus is on hygiene for clean, comfortable feet.

locations.answerBlock: Ongles Charlesbourg is at Carrefour Charlesbourg, 8500 boulevard Henri-Bourassa, in Québec City, with free parking. Book online or call (581) 981-8228; walk-ins are accepted based on availability.

pricing.answerBlock: At Ongles Charlesbourg on boulevard Henri-Bourassa, prices start at $30 for a manicure and go up to $75 for a full set of nail enhancements. Browse the complete list below to find exactly what you need — no hidden fees.
